content:
{
  "agent": "Project Manager",
  "objective": "Coordinate iterations and verify deliveries for mobile homepage MVP.",
  "inputs": ["product brief","brand colors","repo link","staging URL"],
  "constraints": ["Next.js 15 (App Router)","TS 5.9","Tailwind v3","Supabase","Playwright"],
  "tasks": [
    "Create 2-week sprint with 5-day milestone for mobile homepage MVP",
    "Assign owners: Designer, Frontend, Backend, QA, Accessibility, DevOps, Integrator",
    "Create and share sprint board (Backlog, In Progress, Review, Done)",
    "Run daily 10-min standup; collect blockers and escalate",
    "Ensure delivery checkpoints and approvals are scheduled"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Sprint board created and shared",
    "Milestone due dates set and owners assigned"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Provide board link and list of open blockers",
  "signal_tag": "project_manager:done"
}

{
  "agent": "Product Designer (dracarys)",
  "objective": "Produce mobile-first UI mockups and export production-ready assets for the homepage.",
  "inputs": ["/assets/screenshot.png","brand tokens","sample product images"],
  "constraints": ["mobile-first 375–420px","Tailwind utility-friendly tokens","WCAG AA contrast","44x44 tap targets"],
  "tasks": [
    "Create low-fi wireframe: header, hero, categories, featured carousel, bottom nav",
    "Produce high-fi frames (Figma or SVG) annotated for dev",
    "Export assets: icons (SVG), images (WebP 1x/2x), hero image with 40% overlay",
    "Create component-spec.json with sizes, spacings, font scales, Tailwind tokens",
    "Validate contrast and accessibility for Bengali+English text"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Figma/SVG files with annotations uploaded to /designs/homepage/",
    "Asset zip with named files and component-spec.json present"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Upload designs and assets to /designs/homepage/ and signal 'designer:done'",
  "signal_tag": "designer:done"
}

{
  "agent": "Frontend Engineer",
  "objective": "Implement mobile homepage using Next.js 15 App Router, Tailwind v3, TypeScript.",
  "inputs": ["/designs/component-spec.json","assets zip","repo link","Supabase endpoints"],
  "constraints": ["Use Server Components for data fetching where possible","Client components for interactivity","No external UI libs"],
  "tasks": [
    "Create /app/(home)/page.tsx with layout per spec",
    "Implement components: Header, Hero, CategoryGrid, ProductCarousel, BottomNav",
    "Search: client component with debounce and suggestions",
    "Quick-add: client interaction with toast and cart count update",
    "Fetch featured products from Supabase in server component",
    "Use next/image with responsive sizes and WebP fallback",
    "Add i18n hooks for Bengali/English and BDT currency formatting",
    "Add Playwright tests for homepage flows and Lighthouse run"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "PR with working mobile homepage deployed to staging",
    "Playwright tests for homepage pass",
    "Lighthouse perf >= 90 or documented mitigation plan"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Open PR, post staging preview URL, and signal 'frontend:done' with PR link",
  "signal_tag": "frontend:done"
}

{
  "agent": "Backend Engineer (Supabase)",
  "objective": "Provide product/promos APIs, anonymous cart session model, and seeded data for staging.",
  "inputs": ["Supabase project access","schema outline (products,categories,promos)"],
  "constraints": ["Use Supabase JS SDK","RLS for sensitive operations","low-latency endpoints"],
  "tasks": [
    "Create endpoints/views: /featured-products(limit), /categories, /search?q=&limit=20",
    "Implement anonymous cart session storage tied to session_id",
    "Create promos table with city_scope (e.g., Chittagong) and expiry",
    "Seed sample data for featured products and categories relevant to Chittagong",
    "Document API contract in /infra/supabase/contract.json"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Endpoints return JSON per contract on staging",
    "Seeded data visible in staging database",
    "Contract JSON added to repo"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Provide endpoint URLs, staging keys, and schema docs; signal 'backend:done'",
  "signal_tag": "backend:done"
}

{
  "agent": "QA / Playwright Engineer",
  "objective": "Validate homepage flows and run automated accessibility checks.",
  "inputs": ["staging URL","Playwright setup in repo"],
  "constraints": ["Tests in TypeScript","Run in CI"],
  "tasks": [
    "Write Playwright tests: homepage load, search, quick-add, cart drawer open, language toggle, bottom nav",
    "Integrate axe-core for accessibility checks in Playwright",
    "Run tests on staging and capture logs/screenshots for failures",
    "Perform manual scenarios: slow 3G, offline, text-scaling"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Playwright tests pass in CI",
    "No critical accessibility violations (document non-critical items)"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Upload test reports to /reports/playwright/homepage and signal 'qa:done'",
  "signal_tag": "qa:done"
}

{
  "agent": "Accessibility Specialist",
  "objective": "Ensure WCAG AA compliance for homepage components (mobile-first).",
  "inputs": ["design files","frontend staging URL"],
  "constraints": ["WCAG AA","support Bengali and English","mobile 375–420px"],
  "tasks": [
    "Audit color contrast, semantic HTML, ARIA roles, focus order and keyboard navigation",
    "Check tap target sizes and text scaling behavior",
    "Provide code-level fixes: aria-labels, alt text, focus-visible styles, color token adjustments",
    "Deliver accessibility-fixes.md with prioritized remediation"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Checklist with no critical accessibility blockers",
    "Guidance actionable and small enough for frontend PR comments"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Post accessibility-fixes.md and comment on frontend PR with required changes; signal 'accessibility:done'",
  "signal_tag": "accessibility:done"
}

{
  "agent": "DevOps / Performance Engineer",
  "objective": "Optimize build, image delivery, caching and CI for staging deploys.",
  "inputs": ["repo","hosting (Vercel or specified)","assets folder"],
  "constraints": ["Node 24","Next.js build optimizations","CDN caching best-practices"],
  "tasks": [
    "Add CI (GitHub Actions): lint, build, test (Playwright), deploy to staging",
    "Configure next/image optimizations, responsive srcset, and WebP fallback",
    "Set cache-control headers and enable ISR for product lists",
    "Add Lighthouse CI baseline and bundle analysis; add image-compression step"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "CI pipeline passes and auto-deploys to staging",
    "Lighthouse baseline report attached to PR"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Provide CI run link, staging URL, and Lighthouse baseline; signal 'devops:done'",
  "signal_tag": "devops:done"
}

{
  "agent": "Integrator / Release Manager",
  "objective": "Verify final integration, perform pre-release checks, and coordinate rollout.",
  "inputs": ["PR links","staging URL","QA report","accessibility-fixes.md"],
  "constraints": ["Feature-flag rollout","minimal downtime"],
  "tasks": [
    "Merge PRs after sign-offs and enable homepage via feature flag",
    "Run final smoke tests: load, search, quick-add, checkout until order summary",
    "Tag release, update changelog, and prepare rollback steps",
    "Coordinate communication to stakeholders about rollout window"
  ],
  "acceptance_criteria": [
    "Homepage live behind feature flag or progressive rollout",
    "Smoke tests pass post-merge"
  ],
  "handoff_message": "Post release notes, tag, and rollback steps; signal 'integrator:done'",
  "signal_tag": "integrator:done"
}
